testcase.name: <golden:mixed_pii_basic>
testcase.failure: Line 4: VISA detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 4532-0151-1283-0366 Validator: creditcard Line 3: SSN detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 449-87-4100 Validator: ssn Line 1: PHONE detected with 73.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: 212-555-0142 Validator: phone Line 2: AWS_ACCESS_KEY detected with 69.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE Validator: secrets Line 1: BUSINESS detected with 33.0% confidence (LOW) Match: john.doe@example.com Validator: email
